args:
set -eu
first_dir=$(mktemp -d)
second_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cache_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$first_dir" --cache-root "$cache_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness >/dev/null
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$second_dir" --cache-root "$cache_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness >"$second_dir/stdout.txt"
grep -q 'reused=' "$second_dir/stdout.txt"
grep -q '"reused_artifact_count":' "$second_dir/materialization_report.json"
grep -q '"cache_root":"' "$second_dir/materialization_report.json"
grep -q '"cache_namespace":"compile-cache"' "$second_dir/materialization_report.json"
printf 'shared-cache-root\n'

set -eu
first_dir=$(mktemp -d)
second_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cache_dir=$(mktemp -d)
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$first_dir" --cache-root "$cache_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness >/dev/null
cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- build --out "$second_dir" --cache-root "$cache_dir" --region prefill_attention --readiness correctness >"$second_dir/stdout.txt"
grep -q 'reused=' "$second_dir/stdout.txt"
grep -q '"reused_artifact_count":' "$second_dir/materialization_report.json"
grep -q '"cache_root":"' "$second_dir/materialization_report.json"
grep -q '"cache_namespace":"compile-cache"' "$second_dir/materialization_report.json"
printf 'shared-cache-root\n'
